mapper.select: SELECT s.register_id AS "registerId", s.visit_date AS "visitDate", s.diagnosis_summary AS "diagnosisSummary", s.professional_metrics AS "professionalMetrics", s.doctor_name AS "doctorName", s.department_name AS "departmentName", s.updated_at AS "updatedAt" FROM follow_up_last_visit_snapshot s WHERE s.register_id = #{registerId}
